summary: Iteration 3 Content & Affiliate Engine - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified Payload CMS collections (Media, Stacks, Affiliates), REST APIs, /go/[slug] redirect with click tracking, and admin panel groupings.

payload_auth.POST /api/users/login: PASS - Returns JWT token, user object with admin@ace.io
payload_auth.GET /api/users: PASS - Returns paginated docs with user data

stacks_collection.GET /api/stacks: PASS - Returns docs array with blog posts
stacks_collection.POST /api/stacks: PASS - Creates blog post with slug auto-generation
stacks_collection.data_structure: PASS - Has title, slug, category, excerpt, content, status fields
stacks_collection.categories: PASS - Supports ai-strategy, engineering, case-studies, field-notes

affiliates_collection.GET /api/affiliates: PASS - Returns docs array with affiliate data
affiliates_collection.POST /api/affiliates: PASS - Creates affiliate with partnerName, targetUrl, slug, active, categoryTag, clickCount
affiliates_collection.data_structure: PASS - Has partnerName, targetUrl, slug, active, categoryTag, description, clickCount

media_collection.GET /api/media: PASS - Returns empty docs (upload collection available)

affiliate_redirects.GET /go/disabled-test: PASS - Returns 410 with {error: 'This link is currently inactive'}
affiliate_redirects.click_count_increment: PASS - Verified count increments by 1 per redirect visit (2→4 after 2 visits)

admin_panel.status: PASS - /admin loads Payload CMS dashboard after login
admin_panel.content_group: PASS - Contains Media and Stacks collections

features_verified: Payload REST API /api/users accessible (via backend proxy) ✅
Payload REST API /api/stacks - CRUD operations for blog posts ✅
Payload REST API /api/affiliates - CRUD operations for affiliates ✅
Payload REST API /api/media - upload collection available ✅
Blog post (Stacks) creation with title, slug auto-generation, category, excerpt, content, status ✅
Affiliate creation with partnerName, targetUrl, slug, active toggle, categoryTag, description, clickCount ✅
GET /go/vercel increments clickCount by 1 each visit ✅
GET /go/disabled-test returns 410 with error message (inactive affiliate) ✅
/admin page loads Payload CMS admin panel ✅
Admin panel shows Content group (Media, Stacks) and Growth group (Affiliates) ✅
critical_code_review_comments: Collections properly configured with admin groups (Content, Growth) and correct fields
Slug hooks correctly auto-generate from title/partnerName when not provided
Redirect route correctly handles 302, 410, and 404 status codes
Click count increment uses proper null coalescing (affiliate.clickCount ?? 0) + 1
FastAPI proxy correctly forwards all /api/* requests to Next.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 Content & Affiliate Engine fully tested. All 4 collections (Users, Media, Stacks, Affiliates) work via Payload REST API. Redirect route /go/[slug] works with 302/410/404 status codes and click tracking. Admin login: admin@ace.io / AceAdmin2025!. PostgreSQL must be running for Payload CMS.
